ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_rank" INTEGER /* FIFA world ranking of the home team at the time of the match */,
  "away_rank" INTEGER /* FIFA world ranking of the away team at the time of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match (e.g., 3:00 PM) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the team is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "current_fifa_rank" INTEGER /* Current FIFA world ranking of the team */,
  "last_fifa_rank_update" TEXT /* Date when the last FIFA ranking was updated */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "fifa_affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date the country joined FIFA */,
  "fifa_code" TEXT /* FIFA country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the tournament is held */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the tournament */,
  "current_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the tournament (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament rules */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* FIFA world ranking of the team */,
  "points" REAL /* Points accumulated by the team */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the previous ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous ranking (positive for improvement, negative for decline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event (e.g., 45+2 min) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event (e.g., 'Goal by James Rodríguez') */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., 'Goal scored', 'Yellow card issued') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (e.g., left, right) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player in millions */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., fit, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is currently managing */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach's contract expires */,
  "previous_club" TEXT /* Name of the previous club where the coach worked */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_date" TEXT /* Date the stadium was built */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium (e.g., city, district) */,
  "stadium_type" TEXT /* Type of the stadium (e.g., multi-purpose, football-specific) */,
  "last_renovation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "fifa_license_date" TEXT /* Date the referee obtained their FIFA license */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "number_of_matches_officiated" INTEGER /* Total number of matches officiated */,
  "referee_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the referee (e.g., main referee, assistant referee 1, assistant referee 2) */,
  "assistant_referee_3" INTEGER /* Reference to the third assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" INTEGER /* Reference to the fourth official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_assistant_referee_3 FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_3") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_fourth_official FOREIGN KEY ("fourth_official") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed (e.g., match_id, team_id) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity being accessed (e.g., match, team) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
